_comment: Universal stdio-bridge MCP config. Both Claude Code and Codex speak stdio natively, while our SCOPE MCP server is HTTP+OAuth at https://scope-mcp.langguard.ai/mcp. mcp-remote (https://github.com/geelen/mcp-remote) bridges stdio<->HTTP and handles the OAuth dance on first run; the resulting access token is cached under ~/.mcp-auth/ so subsequent sessions start silently. Requires Node 18+ on PATH for npx.
